reasoning: This session targets improved lactate clearance and aerobic capacity, crucial for handling the Alpine Loop's demands. Considering your previous ride's extended rest, start calmly to manage early fatigue. The over-unders will specifically address the 9.3% power drop from 5 to 20 minutes, essential for sustaining higher power on climbs like Emigration Canyon.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x12 minutes with 6 min steady at 209-223W, followed by 6 min alternating 2 min at 242-256W, 1 min at 201-218W. 3 min recovery between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
